entity.label: Raham
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Merciful, one of the descendants of Caleb, the son of Hezron (1 Chr. 2:44).

nodes.label: Raham
nodes.description: Merciful, one of the descendants of Caleb, the son of Hezron (1 Chr. 2:44).

verses.text: And Shema begat Raham, the father of Jorkoam: and Rekem begat Shammai.
